name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to work with numerical data, interpret and evaluate numerical information. Suitable for graduate and managerial roles requiring numerical analysis.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate written information. Suitable for roles requiring strong verbal comprehension.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and logical rules. Good predictor of problem-solving and learning potential.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions from given information.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical concepts and physical principles. Ideal for engineering and technical roles.

name: Verify Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures ability to mentally manipulate and reason with 2D and 3D shapes.

name: Verify G+
description: General ability test measuring verbal, numerical and inductive reasoning together. Adaptive and efficient.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire. Measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to work behavior, leadership, and interpersonal style. Gold standard personality assessment.

name: OPQ32n
description: Normative version of OPQ32. Measures workplace personality traits using Likert-scale format.

name: MQ (Motivation Questionnaire)
description: Assesses motivational style, energy and engagement at work. Identifies what conditions drive an individual's performance.

name: SJT - Personality based Situational Judgement
description: Situational judgement test measuring personality-relevant behaviors in realistic work scenarios.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Java 8 programming language including OOP concepts, streams, and lambda expressions.

name: Core Java
description: Tests fundamental Java programming skills including data structures, algorithms, and OOP principles.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming proficiency including syntax, data structures, libraries, and problem-solving.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests SQL knowledge including queries, joins, subqueries, and database concepts.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Assesses JavaScript proficiency including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming, and frameworks.

name: .NET (New)
description: Assesses .NET framework knowledge and C# programming skills.

name: C# (New)
description: Tests C# programming language proficiency and .NET ecosystem knowledge.

name: C++ (New)
description: Assesses C++ programming skills including memory management, STL, and OOP.

name: Automata Pro
description: Advanced coding simulation test measuring real-world programming ability through coding challenges in multiple languages.

name: Automata Front End
description: Coding test focused on front-end web development skills including HTML, CSS, JavaScript.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Tests knowledge of financial accounting principles, balance sheets, and financial reporting.

name: Business Analysis (New)
description: Assesses business analysis skills including requirements gathering, process mapping, and stakeholder management.

name: Data Analysis (New)
description: Tests ability to interpret, analyze, and draw conclusions from data sets.

name: Microsoft Excel (New)
description: Assesses proficiency in Microsoft Excel including formulas, pivot tables, and data visualization.

name: Microsoft Word (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Microsoft Word including formatting, templates, and document management.

name: Technology Professional 8.0 - Short
description: Comprehensive technology knowledge assessment for IT professionals covering networking, security, and systems.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (Indian)
description: Automated spoken English assessment designed for Indian English speakers. Measures pronunciation, fluency, and comprehension.

name: English Comprehension (New)
description: Tests English reading comprehension and language understanding ability.

name: Graduate 8.0 (Short)
description: Cognitive ability battery for graduate-level candidates. Assesses verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning.

name: Managerial & Professional 7.1 (Short)
description: Cognitive assessment for managerial and professional roles measuring critical reasoning skills.

name: Operational 7.1 (Short)
description: Cognitive assessment designed for operational and frontline roles.

name: Customer Service 7.1 (Short)
description: Behavioral assessment measuring customer service competencies including empathy, patience, and problem resolution.

name: Sales 7.1 (Short)
description: Behavioral assessment for sales roles measuring persuasion, resilience, and customer focus.

name: General Sales Ability (GSA)
description: Cognitive ability test specifically designed for sales roles. Measures reasoning ability in sales contexts.

name: RemoteWorkQ
description: Personality questionnaire assessing suitability and effectiveness for remote/hybrid working environments.

name: Smart Interview Live
description: AI-powered video interview platform for structured behavioral and competency-based interviewing.

name: Smart Interview On Demand
description: Asynchronous video interview tool allowing candidates to record responses to structured questions.

name: R (Programming)
description: Tests R programming language proficiency for data science and statistical analysis roles.

name: Scala
description: Assesses Scala programming skills for big data and functional programming roles.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Tests knowledge of machine learning concepts, algorithms, model evaluation, and practical ML implementation.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Assesses knowledge of Agile methodologies, Scrum, Kanban, and agile best practices.

name: Cyber Security (New)
description: Tests knowledge of cybersecurity concepts, threat management, and security protocols.

name: Cloud Computing (New)
description: Assesses cloud computing knowledge including AWS, Azure, and GCP concepts.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Tests DevOps practices including CI/CD, containerization, infrastructure as code, and monitoring.

name: UNIX/Linux (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Unix/Linux operating systems, shell scripting, and system administration.

name: PHP (New)
description: Tests PHP programming skills for web development roles.

name: Ruby on Rails (New)
description: Assesses Ruby on Rails framework knowledge for web development.

name: Android (New)
description: Tests Android mobile app development skills including Kotlin/Java and Android SDK.

name: iOS (New)
description: Assesses iOS mobile app development skills including Swift and Xcode.

name: HTML5/CSS3 (New)
description: Tests front-end web development skills including HTML5 semantics and CSS3 styling.

name: Selenium (New)
description: Assesses Selenium automation testing framework knowledge.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Tests software manual testing skills including test case design, bug reporting, and QA processes.

name: Accounting & Finance (Short)
description: Tests accounting and finance knowledge for entry to professional level finance roles.

name: Entry Level Sales 7.1
description: Behavioral assessment designed specifically for entry-level sales positions.

name: Contact Center Agent Solution
description: Assessment for contact center and customer service agent roles.

name: Supervisory Skills 5.1
description: Assesses knowledge of supervisory and team leadership skills.

name: Workplace Safety (New)
description: Tests workplace safety knowledge, protocols, and risk assessment.
